function P(P)return z[P+(662730+-601390)]end for P,i in ipairs({{608474+-608473,-71042+73566},{535859+-535858;-299329-(-301835)};{-551436-(-553943);-646577+649101}})do while i[255023+-255022]<i[-12893+12895]do
